summary: This document contains research notes and symptom lists from a user test of a medical intake tool named Mediktor. It features mixed-language observations regarding UX flow, navigation limitations, and specific symptom categorization for back and abdominal pain. The content concludes with a reference to a liabilities message, indicating legal disclaimers within the tested interface.
